intents.label: Password Reset
intents.description: User wants to reset or recover their password
examples: I forgot my password
How do I reset my password?
Can you help me recover my account password?
I can't login, I need to reset my password
Password recovery assistance needed
I locked myself out of my account
Send me a password reset link
I don't remember my login credentials
My password is not working
How to change forgotten password?

intents.label: Billing Inquiry
intents.description: User has questions about billing, invoices, or payments
examples: I was charged twice this month
Can I get a copy of my invoice?
Why is my bill so high?
I want to update my payment method
When will my next payment be due?
I need a refund for my last transaction
Where can I see my billing history?
My credit card was declined
I want to cancel my subscription
How do I apply a promo code?

intents.label: Technical Support
intents.description: User is experiencing a technical issue or bug
examples: The app keeps crashing on my phone
I'm getting a 500 error on the dashboard
Feature X is not working properly
The website is loading very slowly
I can't upload my file, getting an error
My account shows incorrect data
The API is returning unexpected results
Error code 404 when trying to access page
Notifications are not showing up
The integration with Slack is broken

intents.label: Account Management
intents.description: User wants to manage or update their account settings
examples: I want to update my email address
How do I change my username?
Can I add another user to my account?
I want to delete my account
How do I upgrade my plan?
I need to transfer my account to another person
How do I enable two-factor authentication?
Change my notification preferences
Update my profile picture
How do I link my Google account?

intents.label: Product Inquiry
intents.description: User wants information about products, features, or pricing
examples: What features does the premium plan include?
How much does your enterprise plan cost?
Is there a free trial available?
What is the difference between basic and pro plans?
Do you support API integrations?
What programming languages do you support?
Does your product work on mobile?
What is your uptime SLA?
Can I export my data?
Is there a desktop application?

intents.label: Order Tracking
intents.description: User wants to track or inquire about their order
examples: Where is my order?
When will my package arrive?
I haven't received my delivery yet
Can I change my delivery address?
My order was marked delivered but I didn't receive it
How do I track my shipment?
I want to cancel my order
When will my order be shipped?
I received the wrong item
My package arrived damaged

intents.label: General Greeting
intents.description: User is greeting or starting a conversation
examples: Hello
Hi there
Good morning
Hey, I need some help
Hi, can you assist me?
Hello, is anyone there?
Good evening
Hey
Greetings
Hi, I have a question

intents.label: Complaint
intents.description: User is expressing dissatisfaction or filing a complaint
examples: I am very unhappy with the service
This is unacceptable, I want to speak to a manager
Your product is terrible
I've been waiting for 2 weeks with no response
This is the worst customer service I have ever experienced
I'm extremely frustrated
I want to file a formal complaint
You ruined my experience
I'm going to leave a bad review
This is not what I was promised

intents.label: Feature Request
intents.description: User is requesting a new feature or improvement
examples: Can you add dark mode?
It would be great to have bulk export
Please add support for CSV imports
Can you integrate with Zapier?
I would love a mobile app
Please add keyboard shortcuts
Can you add multi-language support?
I want to be able to schedule reports
Please add a drag and drop interface
Can you support SSO login?

intents.label: Escalation
intents.description: User wants to escalate the issue to a human agent
examples: I want to speak to a human
Connect me to a real agent please
Let me talk to your supervisor
I need to speak with someone from your team
Transfer me to customer support
I don't want to talk to a bot
Can I have a callback?
Get me a live representative
I need human assistance
Please escalate this issue
